data.content:
## Revised Plan â€” Per-step expected-output declarations (schema/runtime)

### Canonical Target Vocabulary (defined by parent knots-5464)

| Canonical Target | Meaning | Legacy Mapping |
|---|---|---|
| branch | Feature branch pushed to remote | OutputMode::Remote, raw "remote" |
| pull_request | Pull request opened/updated | OutputMode::Pr, raw "pr" |
| merged_main | Code merged to main and pushed | OutputMode::RemoteMain, raw "remote_main", raw "commit" |
| local | Local-only, no remote artifact | OutputMode::Local, raw "local" |
| note | Metadata-only output (planning notes) | (none) |
| approval | Gate/review step approval | (none) |
| live_deployment | Deployed to a live environment | (none â€” new) |

**Unknown strings are rejected at parse/load time with an error, not a warning.**

### Implementation Steps

#### Step 1: Add ArtifactTarget enum and normalization to profile.rs

Add to `src/profile.rs`:
- `ArtifactTarget` enum with variants: `Branch`, `PullRequest`, `MergedMain`, `Local`, `Note`, `Approval`, `LiveDeployment`
- `ArtifactTarget::as_str() -> &str` returning the canonical snake_case string
- `ArtifactTarget::from_str(s: &str) -> Result<Self>` that accepts both canonical and legacy strings:
  - "branch" â†’ Branch
  - "pull_request", "pr" â†’ PullRequest
  - "merged_main", "remote_main", "commit" â†’ MergedMain
  - "local" â†’ Local
  - "note" â†’ Note
  - "approval" â†’ Approval
  - "live_deployment" â†’ LiveDeployment
  - anything else â†’ Error (rejected, not warned)
- `ActionOutputDef` keeps `artifact_type: String` for serde but add `ActionOutputDef::validate() -> Result<ArtifactTarget>` that calls `ArtifactTarget::from_str`
- Add `ActionOutputDef::normalized(raw: &str, hint: Option<String>) -> Result<Self>` constructor that normalizes and validates

#### Step 2: Update legacy_outputs() in profile_normalize.rs

Modify `legacy_outputs()` at `src/profile_normalize.rs:201-221`:
- Map `OutputMode::Local` â†’ "local" (unchanged)
- Map `OutputMode::Remote` â†’ "branch" (was "remote")
- Map `OutputMode::Pr` â†’ "pull_request" (was "pr")
- Map `OutputMode::RemoteMain` â†’ "merged_main" (was "remote_main")

#### Step 3: Update bundle TOML parsing in profile_toml.rs

Modify `build_outputs_from_toml_profile()` at `src/installed_workflows/profile_toml.rs:346-369`:
- After building `ActionOutputDef`, call `ActionOutputDef::validate()` and return error if invalid
- Apply normalization: if raw `artifact_type` is a legacy string, normalize to canonical form

#### Step 4: Update bundle JSON parsing in profile_json.rs

Same validation and normalization as Step 3 in `src/installed_workflows/profile_json.rs:250+`.

#### Step 5: Update workflow.loom and profile .loom files

- `loom/knots_sdlc/workflow.loom`: Change `output commit` â†’ `output merged_main` (line 31), `output branch` stays (line 19), `output note` stays (line 7)
- `loom/knots_sdlc/profiles/autopilot_with_pr.loom`: Change `output pr` â†’ `output pull_request` (lines 6, 10)
- Verify all other profile .loom files have no explicit output overrides

#### Step 6: Tests

- Parse valid canonical targets: all 7 variants round-trip through from_str â†’ as_str
- Parse legacy strings: "pr" â†’ "pull_request", "remote_main" â†’ "merged_main", "commit" â†’ "merged_main", "remote" â†’ "branch"
- Reject unknown strings: "foobar", "", "deploy" â†’ Error
- legacy_outputs() produces canonical names for all OutputMode variants
- build_outputs_from_toml_profile() normalizes legacy and rejects unknown
- build_outputs_from_json_profile() same
- Existing profile definitions still load correctly after normalization

### Files Changed
- `src/profile.rs` (add ArtifactTarget enum, validate/normalize methods)
- `src/profile_normalize.rs` (update legacy_outputs mapping)
- `src/installed_workflows/profile_toml.rs` (add validation)
- `src/installed_workflows/profile_json.rs` (add validation)
- `loom/knots_sdlc/workflow.loom` (canonical target names)
- `loom/knots_sdlc/profiles/autopilot_with_pr.loom` (canonical target names)

### Risks
- Loom parser must also normalize legacy strings in action declarations â€” verify the parser path from `.loom` â†’ `BundleStateSection` â†’ `ActionOutputDef`
- Snapshot/fixture tests may need updating if they contain legacy output strings

### Complexity: Medium
